Summarize in exactly one sentence: Machine learning algorithms require vast amounts of curated data to function accurately. Without diverse and unbiased datasets, these models can inadvertently learn and amplify human prejudices, leading to discriminatory outcomes in automated decision-making systems.

Summarize in exactly one sentence: The Mediterranean diet emphasizes plant-based foods, healthy fats like olive oil, and moderate consumption of fish and poultry. Numerous longitudinal studies have linked this eating pattern to reduced risks of cardiovascular disease and increased overall longevity.
